name: grid
description: Generic CSS grid layout primitives (Grid, GridCell, GridLine) for tabular/stepwise content like long division or annotated diagrams
whenToUse: Use for free-form grid layouts where content needs explicit row/column placement and divider lines — e.g. polynomial long division, step-by-step tables.
whenNotToUse: Use Table for simple static reference tables with header/body rows.
example:
<Grid cols="auto auto" rows="auto auto">
  <GridCell col={1} row={1}>a</GridCell>
  <GridCell col={2} row={1}>b</GridCell>
  <GridLine col="1 / 3" row={2} />
</Grid>
